extraction.one_line_summary: BUITRAGO Santiago won after catching Gee with 1.5km remaining; ROGLIC attacked Thomas inside final kilometer, gained 3 seconds via bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC changed to almost mountain bike gearing (44t largest cog) specifically for Tre Cime, revealing extreme preparation for steep gradients.
THOMAS attacked inside final 300m for bonus seconds despite leading GC, showing awareness that time gaps mattered more than conserving energy.
GEE repeatedly joined breakaways for mountain points despite mathematical improbability, prioritizing stage win over jersey competition when tactically eliminated.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked Thomas inside final kilometer on 20% gradient after equipment optimization, showing superior steep-gradient form
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: could not follow Roglic's final kilometer attack despite being on wheel, forced to counter-attack for bonus seconds afterward
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: positive: caught Gee with 1.5km remaining and rode straight past on high-altitude finish, demonstrating superior climbing at altitude
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: lost almost a minute to Thomas/Roglic group on Tre Cime, falling to nearly one minute behind in GC
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: moved into top ten after pacing work earlier, suggesting INEOS had surplus climbing strength
